decision_summary: This run follows the user's ai_only instruction in a narrow sense: code, data, scripts, analysis outputs, and submission packaging must all be real local deliverables, while screenshots, step illustrations, and operation visuals may be AI-generated through the workflow image route. The final package therefore combines a template-preserving DOCX report, generated evidence images, executable local scripts, generated CSV data files with more than 5000 rows, and a submit.zip archive.

pre_task_judgment.reason: The user explicitly allowed AI-generated visual evidence, so the report does not need a real machine-side Hadoop deployment pre-task before assembly. However, the second part still requires real local source files and data outputs, which will be generated inside this workspace.
expected_outputs: data generation, cleaning, analysis, and visualization source files
raw and cleaned CSV files with at least 5000 rows
analysis result CSV files and PNG charts

ai_simulated.reason: The user approved AI-generated screenshots for deployment, command outputs, and report figures.

browser_capture.reason: There is no local frontend or browser-delivery requirement in this assignment.

diagram_assets.reason: Screenshot-style evidence is sufficient for this run.

screen_recording.reason: Static figures satisfy the visible requirement.

figure_strategy.why: The requirement repeatedly asks for screenshots and operation evidence across environment deployment, Linux, HDFS, HBase, Hive, Spark, and big-data-processing sections.
planned_anchors: VM and Ubuntu installation success evidence
Spark RDD and Spark SQL results

template_strategy.why: The source DOCX contains the cover shell and grading table but not a usable blank answer template. The workflow will preserve the shell, delete the assignment body, add a simple TOC block, and rebuild the report content according to the specified title and body styles.
notes: Preserve the cover/front matter fields for class, name, student number, college, and exam date.
Use python-docx as the customized template script implementation because the current auto-lab task scripts are stubs and the structure is simple enough for safe shell-preserving editing.
Do not leave the original assignment instructions as body text in the final report.

submission_strategy.why: The requirement explicitly asks for the Word report plus related program code and data files to be packaged together.

notes: The final report should be phrased as a student report rather than as an agent explanation.
AI-generated images are used only as report evidence figures, not as a substitute for the real packaged code and data deliverables.
